review_title: Great for start-ups and easy to use!
description: Extremely positive. I would recommend it to anyone who is starting from scratch or just wants a nice website to start a club or anything.
author: Breanna G.
pros: I needed to make a basic website to start my non-profit. This was amazing to start a business with because it was free, so excellent value. I had no need for customer support because everything was easy to use and self-explanatory. I chose a basic template and got to work. The website loads quickly and works perfectly. One day once I'm making more money i'd be happy to pay for a real domain name.
cons: Honestly, found it very easy to use and amazing value (free). Maybe Google could advertise more that it has so many great free features.

review_title: Brilliant for live documents and dynamic slides. Not great for websites.
description: It cannot deliver a visually impressive website in the same way that competitors like SquareSpace or WordPress can, but it's brilliant for presenting information online. Think of it like a dynamic slide deck rather than a website.
author: Lawrence A.
pros: Google Sites is the most robust and easy to use 'page builder' tool on the market. You can go from zero to an acceptable level website in minutes.
cons: The name site is a bit of a stretch. I have tried building a few full websites with Google Sites and there are a few things lacking like good styling, mobile responsiveness and contact forms. It's a good page-builder or non-linear document, but not a website.

review_title: The easy to use website builder that gets work done in no time.
description: We at Digital Fruits need in some cases fast landing pages or internal project hubs without needing to call a developer. Google Sites consistently fills that space at no additional cost. Page layouts are spartan, however they work well enough for internal marketing as speed matters more than polish.
author: Sakshi M.
pros: Usually, it takes me zero time to spin up an internal campaign microsite or client-facing page. There is so much ease of use I get in return for how quickly I need things live, this really is second to none.
cons: Templates feel outdated and restrictive in creativity. I am a marketing specialist and in this role, I often find myself working frowned upon by the design constraints rather than with them.

review_title: A Little Clunky but Great for Price (Free!!)
description: This is actually a very good program, especially for people who don't know how to build a website or need something simple. There are some great templates that are easy to edit and a lot of options for placing content. However, it is very clunky, not as customizable as I would like and hard to get content exactly where you want it and to display exactly how you want it to.
author: Brie Danielle M.
pros: It is FREE! Themes are easy to set up, edit and use. There are premade templates which are easy to edit. Pages Module very easy to navigate and use. Settings very easy to navigate. There are lots of options for adding content Easy to publish
cons: It is clunky, meaning doesn't flow very well and getting some content where you may want to put, will either be very difficult or not possible. Settings aren't very customizable. Placing pictures to display exactly what you want is very clunky and hard to do and sometimes not possible.

description: Overall I like google sites because it meets my basic needs for cheap amount of money I spend and you can customize the site.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We use google sites to host our important documentation and setup documents, you can use the template to create your content and it is very fast ti create content.
cons: The user interface is a little old compare to other product, if google can add more features to it, that will be good

description: Overall, it is really easy to creste a website that looks nice and runs well... but if you want to do anything fancy, you cannot.
author: Avi P.
pros: Its free and easy to make a simple site that looks nice
cons: You are very limited when it comes to custom features, SEO integration, exporting site to a different platform.

review_title: Perfect for my small business's online needs!
description: Overall, I have no complaints. Google sites absolutely helped get the job done! If I were to launch a new site, I'm sure I could now do so within a reasonable timeframe, too!
author: Samantha B.
pros: Google sites was a humongous help in my quest to launch an online presence for my small cleaning business. It is also one of the more affordable options that I found.
cons: I had a a few minor difficulties while attempting to learn how to navigate the website builder. To be completely fair, this difficulty could be caused purely by my lack of experience in graphic design, though. I did eventually figure it all out.

description: Google Sites has provided me with a fast method of publishing internal FAQ and small facing pages to customers without having to wait on a developer or a designer each time.
author: Jessica C.
pros: I appreciate the speed with which I can spin a small portal containing FAQs or updates, and then send one link to customers or the team.
cons: I do not like the lack of customization of the design, the pages are sometimes a bit plain and cannot give the level of service experience that I want to project.

description: Google sites allows me to create a professional website. Whether I'm looking to provide a homepage for patients to utilize as part of my practice, a space for linking resources, or anything else, it is able to accomodate.
author: Shea G.
pros: Google Sites allows me to set up and update a website for my small business with ease. There are templates I can follow which helps in creating a site that has intuitive page layout and navigation. It provides significant value for the money. I've had no problems with performance and speed of Google Sites so haven't needed to contact their customer support, but I'm sure it is as high quality as the product!
cons: The templates definitely feel like 'this website was made from a template,' however, I don't know that this is a bad thing .

description: Overall my experience with Google Sites has been incredible. Great platform that can be used in multiple contexts.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is incredibly easy to use google sites to make a website. The options available to use are incredibly intuitive. It is very fast to publish the website once I have made it.
cons: I don't see an option to connect the sites to a domain to be able to get a fully working website that is also findable online. This would make the platform much better.

review_title: Google Sites paginas sencillas y rapidas
description: Google sites es un constructor de sitios webs simple, que si bien no es la mejor opcion para crear sitios complejos, si resulta muy util para crear paginas sencillas de forma rapida, las cuales suelo utiliar en mis campañas de marketing para atraer nuevos clientes con muy buenos resultados.
author: Paula F.
pros: Son varias las caracteristicas que me gustan de google sites, ademas de que es gratuito, me permite conectar mi propio dominio sin costo alguno, y se integra perfectamente con los otros productos de google lo cual facilita la colaboracion con otros.
cons: En los aspectos negativos de google sites se encuentran principalmente sus limetaciones en cuanto al editor y sus plantillas pues tienen pocas opciones de personalizacion para cambiar la apariencia de los sitios web.

description: The experience is good ,but you need to practice more
author: Molly N.
pros: I like it because you can create you own design in they templet.
cons: To create my landing page for my marketing business.

description: I have had a great experience, I would even enjoy just using it in my free time to create cool concepts!
author: Angelina E.
pros: Oh, how I love Google Sites! It is so easy to create a site and publish it. I've been able to do multiple different formats to provide to my company on how we can get the best use out of Google Sites.
cons: There is genuinely not a con. I have had the best of luck using sites and i plan to keep using it in the future.

author: Ronald W.
pros: The main pro about Google Sites is that it's free to use and very easy to set up. It's also a good tool for making internal websites to store business documents.
cons: The main con would be the limited functionality of the product. There's not much customization that can be done but for a free site builder, it isn't too bad.

review_title: Even for Sales Enablement? Yes! Google Sites helps in any mission!
description: This is really an easy site tool that will help you in many missions - like your Playbooks, internal product sites, or training missions. Super easy to setup and update. Everything seems that was done by a pro.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to setup and share. Real time updates like no other. You can create sites, in special internal, and put it running with many features and resources combined with Google Tech Stack like Google Workspace.
cons: Poor templates. Could have a better site link alias to make things easy. But not a bit issue.

review_title: Sites - The Perfect Addition to Workspace
description: Overall, if you use Google Workspace as a whole, then Sites will work GREAT in your organization. It seamlessly flows with all other Workspace products and is easy to use / manage.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The biggest pro of Google Sites is the ease and usability of the product. This product has a set limit of possibilities in terms of structure, and capabilities -which makes onboarding very easy. Additionally, the ease at which it connects to other Google Workspace platforms like Docs, Forms and Sheets is extremely seamless. You can easily link and display other Workspace documents.
cons: If you are a more experienced user hoping to have more control over the design of your site, then this product may be too simple. There is currently no "advance user" functions that allow a user to add their own formatting via HTML, etc. You have to be okay with the set template options.

review_title: Only great for a very simple website
description: It's really good if you want a quick website which does very basic and simple things. Wouldn't recommend for a more advanced website.
author: Sayma B.
pros: It's really easy to use. It's great for non-coders as you can drag and drop things onto the website and it's there.
cons: It's really limited, there isn't a lot you can do besides adding text, images, documents (only google ones) and videos. The design layouts are really limited too. It's not really customisable as a result.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's fairly simple to learn and use. I didn't need any external training to pick it up.
cons: It's a very basic site building software, so it can be frustrating at times when you want to do more complicated tasks but are hindered by the software limitations.

review_title: Practical way of creating a lean website
author: Berke Can U.
pros: I use Google Sites when I need to create a basic website in a short time period since it offers all required tools for building a simple website.
cons: Google Sites do not offer drag and drop payment gateway integration option which would be beneficial for creating simple websites that require payment option.

description: To use google sites we don't have to pay any fees and also we don't have to buy hosting and cloud space.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Google sites are helping small businesses in creating a simple website for themselves. I sometimes help some restaurants to build a basic website using google sites to showcase their menu, contact details, and other important details.
cons: Making a website is easy but because of the less customization option, most of the sites build on google sites look somewhat similar to eachother.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Google Sites is a great easy way to put together a simple website at no cost. It is useful for sharing basic information to your audience.
cons: It is difficult to get a fully customized look with Google Sites as all pages are in their basic template. I have also had issues in the past with people being able to access the URL even if it is a public link and the person is logged in with a Google account.

review_title: this is the best it's easy to use thanks
description: google sites is cool you can write anything you want and make a project out of things that's something i like the most .
author: noah W.
pros: When you get to bulid and write things .
cons: the best software ever i like that you can create cool parts into things which is so epic .

description: Google Sites is easy to use, but has few editing tools.
author: Gabriel B.
pros: The software is very easy to be used. One can build a site in few hours.
cons: The scarcity of templates and editing tools.

review_title: Easy to use, great for small businesses and internal websites
author: Nir G.
pros: For anything from knowledge sharing to a simple online storefront, google sites provides a great foundation.
cons: It lacks embedding and scripting abilities. I would love to see firebase integration and easily embedding non google products. Seems like you can only embed in 'boxes' at the moment.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall experience is good as we can make our a website in just few minutes without any prior knowledge of coding.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's is easy to use and have simple UI .It's is also free to use.can create web site on google site without having knowledge of any computer languages.
cons: Very few templates available. Less customisation option to make a web sites
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
